Art & Community Based Tourism

Experience Rwanda Through Arts, Culture, and People

Where Art Tells Stories and Communities Bring Them to Life. Discover authentic cultural experiences, original Rwandan artworks, and community-powered tourism near Volcanoes National Park.

Departments
Musanze Visual Journey

Volcanoes, Gorillas, and Living Culture

Explore the energy of Musanze through cinematic imagery and immersive footage inspired by Rwanda’s volcanic landscapes and mountain gorillas.

Volcanoes National Park Horizon

Dramatic volcanic peaks framing Northern Rwanda’s iconic landscape.

Community and Heritage

Authentic cultural identity powered by local people.

Mountain Gorilla Presence

Conservation-driven tourism rooted in respect and protection.

Misty Highlands

Fresh air, green valleys, and panoramic volcanic ridges.

Immersive Video

Experience Rwanda in Motion

Watch a curated showcase of Rwanda’s landscapes, wildlife, and culture to feel the destination before arrival.

Volcanoes & Highlands
Gorilla Conservation Journey
Our Mission

Empowering Communities Through Tourism & Creativity

Volcano Arts Center Inc is a cultural and creative hub located near the iconic Volcanoes National Park, built on the belief that tourism can be both enriching for visitors and transformative for local communities.

We operate at the intersection of art, culture, and community-based tourism, creating experiences that are authentic, immersive, and socially impactful. Our mission is to empower women and youth with sustainable creative skills through art and tourism.

Learn Our Story →
🎨

"Where Art Tells Stories"

Since 2012 · Musanze, Rwanda

What We Do

Our Departments

Seven interconnected departments working together to deliver authentic cultural experiences and empower communities.

🎭

Arts & Cultural Center

The creative heart of our company. Showcasing, curating, and promoting Rwandan art and culture through exhibitions and cultural experiences.

Explore Gallery →
🌍

Community-Based Tourism

Authentic cultural tourism experiences — village walks, biking, traditional weddings, and cultural tours near Volcanoes National Park.

View Experiences →
🌱

Environmental Conservation

Promoting sustainability through environmental awareness, community engagement, tree planting, and eco-friendly tourism practices.

Our Initiatives →
💃

Talent Development

Training and empowering youth, single mothers, persons with disabilities, and elders through traditional dance and cultural performance.

Meet Our Talent →
🧭

Tour Operations

Seamless visitor logistics, tour coordination, and experience planning. Integrating our offerings into broader tourism itineraries.

Plan Your Visit →
🤝

Partnerships & Growth

Building relationships with tour companies, hotels, NGOs, and cultural institutions to expand our impact globally.

Partner With Us →
✋

Artisan Empowerment

Supporting local artisans and craftspeople with training, income opportunities, and access to markets through fair-trade practices.

Shop Handcrafts →

Cultural Journeys

Featured Experiences

Step into real Rwandan community life through immersive, meaningful encounters.

View All Experiences →
Cultural
Performance & Dance

Traditional Dance Experience

Enjoy authentic traditional dance performances followed by interactive sessions where you learn basic steps and cultural meanings.

⏱ 2-3 hours Learn More →
Village
Community Immersion

Village Walk Experience

Guided walks through local villages exploring homes, daily life, and community traditions while interacting with residents.

⏱ 3-4 hours Learn More →
Creative
Art & Craft

Art & Creative Experience

Explore local artistic expression including handmade crafts and visual arts. Observe creative processes and learn the stories behind each artwork.

⏱ 2-3 hours Learn More →

Authentic Rwanda?
